security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5000 http://localhost:5000 https:; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.longDescription: A native SOC analyst console for a self-hosted hybrid deception platform that detects reconnaissance, credential abuse, and fleet health issues.
